key_facts: No license needed – licensed skipper included on every charter.
Tier B boats (Mangusta 80 variants): €4,719 minimum 4h, jet ski included.
All prices include fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.
All boats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.

faq.q: Do I need a boat license to rent a boat in Marbella in 2026?
faq.a: No. Every charter with our fleet includes a licensed skipper who handles navigation, mooring, and safety. You simply relax and enjoy the coast.

faq.q: What is the cheapest no-license boat rental in Marbella in 2026?
faq.a: The Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) is our most affordable option. For exact pricing, contact us via WhatsApp. The Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) starts at €749 for 2 hours.

faq.q: What is included in the price for a no-license boat rental?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.

faq.q: Can I rent a Mangusta 80 without a license?
faq.a: Yes. The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) and its white/grey variants are available without a license. Price is €4,719 minimum 4 hours, and a jet ski is included free.

faq.q: How do I book a no-license boat in Marbella for 2026?
faq.a: Visit our website at Boat Rental Marbella, choose your yacht, and contact us via WhatsApp for availability and booking. We confirm within 24 hours.

faq.q: Are there any additional fees for fuel or mooring?
faq.a: No. Fuel, mooring at Puerto Banús, and all port fees are included in the quoted price. What you see is what you pay.

faq.q: What is the maximum group size without a license?
faq.a: Most of our yachts accommodate up to 12 passengers. The Ferretti 94 (29m) and Canados 86 (26m) also take 12 pax. Smaller boats like the Dubhe take up to 5 pax.

faq.q: Can I extend my charter on the day?
faq.a: Yes, subject to availability. Extra hours are charged at the pro-rata hourly rate. Just ask your skipper or contact our office via WhatsApp.

data.body_html:
If you're looking for Marbella boat rental no license prices 2026, you've come to the right place. Renting a yacht in Marbella without a skipper's license is straightforward – every boat in our fleet comes with a licensed skipper, so you can focus on the views. This guide covers the actual rates for 2026, what's included, and how to book a stress-free day on the water from Puerto Banús.

Why No License Is Needed in Marbella

Spanish maritime law requires a license for anyone operating a pleasure craft over a certain length or engine power. By chartering a yacht with a licensed skipper, you bypass that requirement entirely. Our skippers are experienced, English-speaking professionals who handle navigation, mooring, and safety. You simply enjoy the sun, sea, and snacks. All departures are from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic marina.

Marbella Boat Rental No License Prices 2026 – Tier A

Our most popular no-license options are the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) and the Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax). Prices are all-inclusive and fixed for 2026:

  • 2 hours: €749
  • 4 hours: €1,499
  • 8 hours (full day): €2,299

These rates include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras.

Marbella Boat Rental No License Prices 2026 – Tier B

For a larger experience, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – available in grey and white variants – is priced at €4,719 minimum 4 hours. This includes a free jet ski for your group. Perfect for a luxury day out along the Marbella coast, from Cabopino to Estepona.

Other No-License Boats – Pricing on Request

Our full fleet includes many other yachts without published hourly rates. These include the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax), Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax), Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax), Pershing 46 (14m, 10 pax), and more. For exact pricing, contact us via WhatsApp – we respond quickly with a custom quote.

What’s Included in Every No-License Charter

Every booking includes: licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and 21% IVA. There are no port fees, mooring charges, or cleaning fees. The price you see is the price you pay. All boats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.

How to Book a No-License Boat in Marbella for 2026

Booking is simple. Visit our Boat Rental Marbella homepage, browse the fleet, and use the WhatsApp button to contact us. Tell us your preferred date, group size, and duration. We'll confirm availability and send a booking link. Payment is secure, and we hold your slot once confirmed.

Popular Routes Without a License

From Puerto Banús, you can cruise to Marbella Marina, anchor at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés, or head to Estepona or Sotogrande. Your skipper knows the best spots for swimming, lunch, and photo stops. The Golden Mile skyline and La Concha mountain provide a stunning backdrop.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need a boat license to rent a boat in Marbella in 2026?

No. Every charter with our fleet includes a licensed skipper who handles navigation, mooring, and safety. You simply relax and enjoy the coast.

What is the cheapest no-license boat rental in Marbella in 2026?

The Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) is our most affordable option. For exact pricing, contact us via WhatsApp. The Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) starts at €749 for 2 hours.

What is included in the price for a no-license boat rental?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.

Can I rent a Mangusta 80 without a license?

Yes. The Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) and its white/grey variants are available without a license. Price is €4,719 minimum 4 hours, and a jet ski is included free.

How do I book a no-license boat in Marbella for 2026?

Visit our website at Boat Rental Marbella, choose your yacht, and contact us via WhatsApp for availability and booking. We confirm within 24 hours.

Are there any additional fees for fuel or mooring?

No. Fuel, mooring at Puerto Banús, and all port fees are included in the quoted price. What you see is what you pay.

What is the maximum group size without a license?

Most of our yachts accommodate up to 12 passengers. The Ferretti 94 (29m) and Canados 86 (26m) also take 12 pax. Smaller boats like the Dubhe take up to 5 pax.

Can I extend my charter on the day?

Yes, subject to availability. Extra hours are charged at the pro-rata hourly rate. Just ask your skipper or contact our office via WhatsApp.

Ready to book your Marbella boat rental no license prices 2026? Browse our fleet and contact us today. Your luxury day on the water starts here.
